summary: Plan reviewed — 1 blocking issue (pullTimeoutMs scope error in ContainerManager.java: pullTimeoutMs declared inside if block but used outside it), 1 important issue (default should be 5 min not 1 min), 1 minor clarification. See review-plan.md for details.
